name: IgGM
description: Design de novo antibody/VHHs given a target antigen. Placed top 3 in AIntibody competition. Wet lab validated for 7/60 hit rate against PD-L1, with ~5.3x affinity boost over two iterative rounds.
capabilities: Design de novo antibody/VHHs given a target antigen
Wet lab validated for 7/60 hit rate against PD-L1, with ~5.3x affinity boost over two iterative rounds

pdbFile.description: Target antigen structure in PDB format

targetChains.description: Chain IDs of the target antigen

hotspots.description: Epitope residues on the target to focus design on

numDesigns.description: Number of antibody/VHH designs to generate
